meta.description: Wasel sample data — Swedish Middle Eastern community app

currentUser.name: Demo User
currentUser.bio: Just trying out Wasel! Love meeting new people and a good game of chess.

people.name: Layla Hassan
people.bio: Librarian & coffee lover. Looking for real conversations and maybe a book club!

people.name: Omar Al-Rashid
people.bio: Civil engineer by day, footballer by evening. Love exploring Swedish nature on weekends.

people.name: Sara Lindqvist
people.bio: Swedish-Moroccan mix. Love hiking in the archipelago and discovering new music. Ask me about Moroccan food!

people.name: Karim Tehrani
people.bio: Foodie & gamer. Ask me about Persian cuisine — I can make a killer ghormeh sabzi. Always up for chess.

people.name: Amina Yusuf
people.bio: Studying medicine at Uppsala University. Dream of travelling to 50 countries. Currently at 12!

people.name: Erik Bergström
people.bio: Grew up in Södermalm. Big football fan (AIK!). Love connecting with people from different backgrounds.

people.name: Fatima Al-Zahra
people.bio: Professional chef & amateur oud player. Cooking is my love language — food bridges every culture.

people.name: Dilan Özdemir
people.bio: Full-stack developer and chess enthusiast. Raised in Örebro, roots in Duhok. Always up for a match!

people.name: Nora Khalil
people.bio: Lebanese-Swedish architect. Coffee fuels my designs. Love exploring the connection between cultures through design.

people.name: Hassan Rashidi
people.bio: Software dev at Spotify. Chess nerd. Reading Dostoevsky, writing bad poetry. Let's play!

people.name: Zainab Karimi
people.bio: Fine arts student. Painting is how I see the world. Fluent in Persian, Swedish, and English.

people.name: Björn Lindberg
people.bio: Teacher and football coach. Love the outdoors and meeting new people. Open to all conversations!

people.name: Mariam Osman
people.bio: Media student. Podcast creator. Running is my therapy — currently training for the Stockholm Marathon.

people.name: Tariq Al-Saadi
people.bio: Iraqi-Swedish entrepreneur. Started a halal restaurant on Södermalm. Traveller at heart — 35 countries and counting.

people.name: Elif Yilmaz
people.bio: Interior designer from Gothenburg with Turkish roots. Addicted to good coffee and vintage furniture hunting.

people.name: Ahmed Nur
people.bio: IT consultant. Football is life (and chess on rainy days). Grew up in Malmö, proud of this city.

people.name: Rania Mansour
people.bio: PhD student in environmental science. Syrian-Swedish. Believe strongly in community and education.

people.name: Samuel Tesfaye
people.bio: Ethiopian-Swedish musician. Play guitar in a local band. Sport is my second passion after music.

messages.text: Hej! I saw you just joined Wasel 👋
Want to play a quick game to break the ice?
Salam! Your profile looks really interesting 😊
Wa alaykum salam! Thanks, yours too!
Are you into cooking? I see you listed Food as an interest 🍽️
Hej Omar! Fellow football fan here ⚽
Ha! Who do you support? I'm AIK all the way 😄
Haha classic! We can still be friends I guess 🤝
I heard you're up for chess?
Challenge sent. Good luck — you'll need it 😏

autoReplies: Have you been to Stockholm before?
What do you think about playing a game? 🎮
So cool, tell me more about that!
I was just thinking the same thing 😂
Oh really? I had no idea!
That's exactly how I feel too.
We should meet up for fika sometime ☕
Do you know any good spots in Stockholm?

triviaQuestions.q: What is the capital of Sweden?
How do you say "Hello" in Arabic?
Which language is spoken in Sweden?
What is the Stockholm subway called?
Which country borders Sweden to the west?
What does "Fika" mean in Swedish culture?
"Ramadan" is a holy month in which religion?
How do you say "Thank you" in Swedish?
Which city is Sweden's second largest?
Which Scandinavian country is Stockholm in?
How do you say "Goodbye" in Arabic?
What is the Swedish currency called?
"Eid" is a celebration in which religion?
